# Agents.as

> Agents.as is an AI-agent-as-a-service subscription for South African
> businesses. Customers get a dedicated AI agent trained on their industry,
> tools, and tone of voice. The agent qualifies leads, drafts documents,
> answers clients, and handles repetitive operational work around the clock.
> Agents go live within 48 hours of sign-up. Pricing is a flat monthly
> subscription in South African rand (ZAR), starting at R499/month, and every
> plan begins with a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

Key facts:

- Setup time: most agents are live within 48 hours of sign-up; Enterprise
  deployments with custom integrations may take up to one week.
- Availability: agents work 24/7 inside the customer's existing tools
  (email, Slack, WhatsApp, CRM, dashboard).
- Industries covered: real estate, legal, marketing, finance, healthcare,
  and e-commerce, with multi-industry coverage on higher plans.
- Pricing (ZAR, per month): Starter R499 (one industry, up to 1 000 tasks),
  Professional R1 499 (multi-industry, up to 5 000 tasks, custom
  integrations), Enterprise R4 999 (unlimited tasks, custom workflows,
  on-premise deployment, SLA).
- Trial and cancellation: 14-day free trial on every plan, no credit card
  to start, cancel anytime with one click and no cancellation fees.
- Data: encrypted in transit and at rest; customer data is never sold and
  never used to train models for other customers; POPIA rights honoured;
  Enterprise supports on-premise deployment.
- Human oversight: outputs in regulated fields (legal, healthcare, finance)
  are drafts for professional review, not professional advice.
- Provenance: the Agents.as website itself was designed, written, and coded
  by an AI agent — the product demonstrating itself.

## How it works

1. Brief us like you'd brief a new hire — pick your industry, describe the
   workflow, point at the busywork. Fifteen minutes, no technical skills.
2. We configure and train your agent — your tone of voice, templates, and
   tools (email, Slack, WhatsApp, CRM), wired in and stress-tested. Live
   within 48 hours.
3. Delegate, monitor, scale — hand off repetitive work, watch it in your
   dashboard, tweak behaviour anytime, add capacity as you grow.

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What is an AI agent as a service?
A: A subscription where you get a dedicated AI worker — configured for your
industry, trained on your processes and tone of voice — instead of building
AI automation yourself. Agents.as sets yours up within 48 hours and it works
inside the tools you already use, for a flat monthly fee in rands.

Q: How much does an AI agent cost in South Africa?
A: Agents.as plans are flat monthly subscriptions in rands: Starter is
R499/month (one industry, up to 1 000 tasks), Professional is R1 499/month
(multi-industry, up to 5 000 tasks), and Enterprise is R4 999/month
(unlimited tasks, custom workflows, SLA). Every plan starts with a 14-day
free trial, no credit card required.

Q: Which industries can an AI agent work in?
A: Real estate (lead qualification, listings, viewings), legal (contracts,
demand letters, research), marketing (campaign copy, A/B testing,
reporting), finance (portfolio monitoring, reconciliation, client reports),
healthcare (triage, bookings, record summaries), and e-commerce (support
tickets, returns, cart recovery). Professional and Enterprise plans cover
multiple industries at once.

Q: Do AI agents replace employees?
A: No — an agent takes over the repetitive busywork so your people can do
the work that actually needs them. You stay responsible for decisions, and
in regulated fields (legal, healthcare, finance) outputs are drafts for
professional review, not professional advice.

Q: How long until my agent is ready?
A: Most agents go live within 48 hours of sign-up. Enterprise deployments
with custom integrations may take up to one week.

Q: Do I need technical skills to use it?
A: No. You interact with your agent through the tools you already use —
email, Slack, WhatsApp, or a simple dashboard. Setup is fully handled.

Q: Is my data secure?
A: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, is never sold, and is
never used to train models for other customers. Enterprise plans include
on-premise deployment if data must never leave your network.

## Pages

- [Home](/): product overview, live interactive demo, industry
  capabilities, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): data collection, protection, retention, and
  POPIA rights.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): subscription terms, free trial, cancellation,
  acceptable use, and liability.
